description_long: This cabin features a simple rectangular structure with a dark, textured gable roof and light-colored walls. The roof appears to be made of shingles or tiles, providing a classic, rustic look. The front facade includes a small set of three square windows arranged in a row, while the side facades each have two square windows. The rear facade is plain, with no visible windows or doors. The cabin sits low to the ground and lacks any visible porch or exterior ornamentation. Its compact form and minimal detailing suggest a utilitarian, traditional design suitable for residential or small-scale urban use.
description: A compact, rectangular cabin with a dark gable roof, light walls, and small square windows on three sides.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from above and slightly to the side, showing the dark gable roof and the front facade with three square windows.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the cabin, clearly displaying the three square windows beneath the gable roof.
description_view_2: The side of the cabin is visible, featuring two square windows and the plain wall structure.
description_view_3: The rear of the cabin is shown, with a blank wall and no windows or doors visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and dark shingle or tile covering
attribute_window_arrangement: Three small square windows symmetrically arranged on the front facade, two small square windows on each side facade, no windows on the rear
attribute_door_placement: No exterior doors are visible in the provided views
